description: Composition White shirt made of 100% cotton, has a tipped collar with a buttoned front placket, full sleeves with buttoned cuffs, SPI 16 on the shoulders, patch pocket on the left chest, box pleat at the back and a tailed hem Fitting Regular Wash care Machine wash separately in cold water in a gentle cycle inside out, using a high quality detergent Do not bleach or wring Tumble dry low Line dry inside out in shade Warm steam iron; do not iron on decorations This crisp white shirt from the Essentials edition of arrow's Premium Collection is crafted from herringbone weave cotton fabric and fine cuts in a visually contemporary line that offers a flattering formal silhouette, making for an easy addition to your wardrobe. Team it with crisp formal pants or denims and a blazer. Add on leather shoes and classy accessories for that perfect formal look. Model statistics The model wears size M in shirts Height: 5'11"; Shoulders: 17.5"
